Home About

Calm, fast, reproducible

Drake OS is a Linux distribution forged for people who want their computer to get out of the way.

What makes it different

Every build is reproducible. Every page you are reading was materialized once, then served as plain files — nothing to patch at runtime.

The trident

DistroForge forges the distro, Drake OS ships it, and Palimpseste publishes it.

Forged with DistroForge · Drake OS
